name: Old Time Fudge (Fran Zipfel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 3-quart saucepan. Grease the bottom and sides of the pan with butter.
2. Combine sugar, whipping cream, unsweetened chocolate, salt, and corn syrup in the saucepan.
3. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly until the sugar dissolves completely and the chocolate melts.
4. Continue cooking to reach a soft-ball stage (234°F/114°C). Stir only if necessary to prevent scorching.
5. Remove from the heat immediately and stir in butter until smooth.
6. Cool the mixture to lukewarm temperature (110°F/43°C) without stirring.
7. Add vanilla extract and pecans, beating until thickened.
8. Pour into a buttered shallow pan and let cool completely before cutting into squares.
